item.description: ### Changed - The permission approval on iPhone now shows a countdown, so you can see how long you have to answer before it hands back to your Mac or the agent's own prompt — matching the Apple Watch. It also counts down to the real deadline now, so a phone that reconnects partway through the window shows the time that's actually left. - If your iPhone has notifications turned off (or can't show them), Perch no longer holds a permission for the full phone window waiting on an alert you'd never see — it hands back to your Mac or the agent's own prompt sooner. - Simplified Perch's Codex hook (removed a field that did nothing). Codex will ask you to approve the hook again — run `/hooks` in Codex and trust Perch's entry; the menu bar reminds you if anything isn't trusted.
